task_commands.name: Сборка проекта (iOS Simulator)
task_commands.command: xcodebuild build -project App/Vreader/Vreader.xcodeproj -scheme Vreader -destination "platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 16" CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO SWIFT_TREAT_WARNINGS_AS_ERRORS=YES 2>&1 | grep -E "(BUILD SUCCEEDED|BUILD FAILED|error:)" | head -20
task_commands.stdout: xcode-select: error: tool 'xcodebuild' requires Xcode, but active developer directory '/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools' is a command line tools instance

task_commands.name: Проверка check_refs.py
task_commands.stdout:
✅ Все API совместимы с iOS 17+
✅ Проект чист — можно публиковать

task_commands.name: Поле underlyingDescription присутствует в AppError (FR-10, FR-17)
Поле underlyingError исключено из CodingKeys в AppError (FR-09)
task_commands.command: grep -c "underlyingError" App/Vreader/Vreader/AppError.swift | xargs -I{} sh -c 'grep "CodingKeys" App/Vreader/Vreader/AppError.swift | grep -c "underlyingError" || echo 0'

task_commands.name: Ключи error.* присутствуют в en Localizable.strings
Ключи error.* присутствуют в ru Localizable.strings и совпадают по количеству
task_commands.stderr:
/bin/sh: -c: line 0: syntax error near unexpected token `('
/bin/sh: -c: line 0: `diff <(grep "\"error\." App/Vreader/Vreader/en.lproj/Localizable.strings | sed 's/ =.*//' | sort) <(grep "\"error\." App/Vreader/Vreader/ru.lproj/Localizable.strings | sed 's/ =.*//' | sort)'

task_commands.name: Отсутствие хардкода строк в фабричных методах AppError (NFR-03)
task_commands.command: awk '/static func fileNotFound|static func networkUnavailable|static func premiumRequired|static func timeout/,/^    \}/' App/Vreader/Vreader/AppError.swift | grep -E 'description:|recoveryHint:' | grep -v "L10n\." | wc -l

task_commands.name: analyticsCode не содержит скобок и динамических данных (NFR-05)
task_commands.command: grep -A5 "var analyticsCode" App/Vreader/Vreader/AppError.swift | grep -v "//" | grep -E '\(|\)|path|token|url' | wc -l
